goal: Hook new audience — show the problem barbers face

reel_overrides.subtext: Your shop should book itself — automatically.

post_overrides.hook: Stop chasing clients. Let them come to you.
post_overrides.body: With Noble, your barbershop gets a booking page that works 24/7. Clients pick their slot, get a confirmation, and show up — no DMs, no calls.

goal: Teach barbers 5 signs they need booking software — saves & shares

slides.title: 5 signs your barbershop needs booking software
slides.body: Swipe to see if this is you →

slides.title: 1. You take bookings by DM
slides.body: Clients message you, you reply hours later. You lose bookings while you're cutting.

slides.title: 2. You have no-shows every week
slides.body: No reminder system = clients forget. Noble sends automatic SMS reminders.

slides.title: 3. You work late answering texts
slides.body: Your evenings belong to you. Not to managing a calendar.

slides.title: 4. Double-bookings happen
slides.body: Two clients, same slot. Noble prevents this automatically in real time.

slides.title: 5. You have no idea what you made this month
slides.body: Noble tracks every booking and payment. Dashboard always ready.

slides.title: If you nodded at 2+
slides.body: Try Noble free for 14 days. noblelink.app

reel_overrides.subtext: Noble tracks every booking, payment, and no-show automatically.

post_overrides.body: Noble gives you a live dashboard with every metric that matters. Bookings, revenue, retention — all in one place.
